candidates.name: Humberto Sanchez
candidates.bio: Humberto draws on experience as a Field Operations Manager, Branch Manager, and Employment Specialist to lead with accountability and care. Her background in janitorial management, workforce development, and criminal justice shows strong leadership potential in team building and operational oversight.

candidates.name: Eddie Bennett
candidates.bio: Eddie has operations leadership experience with Dollar General, where he managed daily store operations, staffing, and customer service delivery. His background in retail operations, public safety dispatch, and service in the U.S. Marine Corps reflects experience leading teams and maintaining accountability in structured environments.

candidates.name: Orlando Doss
candidates.bio: Orlando has operations leadership experience with Octapharma Plasma, where he managed frontline teams and supported process improvement initiatives in a regulated healthcare environment. His work improving operational workflows and coordinating staff operations reflects hands-on experience leading teams in high-throughput service settings.
